SEARCH
Package io.vertigo.core.node.config

Class ModuleConfigBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.core.node.config.ModuleConfigBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<ModuleConfig>
public final class ModuleConfigBuilder extends Object implements Builder<ModuleConfig>
The moduleConfigBuilder defines the configuration of a module. A module has a name. A module is composed of - components invalid input: '&' plugins - aspects - definitions (defined by resources or providers)
Author:
npiedeloup, pchretien
